     },
     "configuration": {
       "title": "IntelliJ Styled Search",
       "properties": {
+        "intellijStyledSearch.engine": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "enum": [
+            "zoekt",
+            "codesearch"
+          ],
+          "default": "zoekt",
+          "markdownDescription": "Search engine to use. `zoekt` runs the Rust local shard/mmap engine with automatic codesearch fallback when the runtime is unavailable or still warming up. `codesearch` uses the existing TypeScript planner plus ripgrep verifier."
+        },

           "default": [

     "watch": "tsc -watch -p ./",
     "vscode:prepublish": "npm run compile",
     "pretest": "npm run compile",

@@ -86,15 +126,89 @@
         "key": "ctrl+shift+alt+p",
         "mac": "cmd+shift+alt+p"
       }
     ],
+    "submenus": [
+      {
+        "id": "intellijStyledSearch.editorContext",
+        "label": "IntelliJ Search"
+      }
+    ],
     "menus": {
       "editor/context": [
         {
+          "submenu": "intellijStyledSearch.editorContext",
+          "when": "editorTextFocus",
+          "group": "navigation@98"
+        },
+        {
           "command": "intellijStyledSearch.searchSelection",
           "when": "editorHasSelection",
           "group": "navigation@99"
         }
+      ],
+      "intellijStyledSearch.editorContext": [
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.searchInProject",
+          "group": "1_search@1"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.searchSelection",
+          "when": "editorHasSelection",
+          "group": "1_search@2"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.findCallees",
+          "group": "2_callGraph@2"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.findImplementations",
+          "group": "2_callGraph@3"
+        },
+        {

+          "group": "2_callGraph@4"
+        },

+          "group": "2_callGraph@5"

+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.showCallGraphInfo",
+          "group": "2_callGraph@6"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.startMcpServer",
+          "group": "3_mcp@1"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.stopMcpServer",
+          "group": "3_mcp@2"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.rebuildIndex",
+          "group": "4_index@1"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.switchEngine",
+          "group": "4_index@2"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.showZoektInfo",
+          "group": "4_index@3"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.explainZoektQuery",
+          "group": "4_index@4"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.diagnoseFileInIndex",
+          "group": "4_index@5"
+        },
+        {
+          "command": "intellijStyledSearch.reinject",
+          "group": "5_recovery@1"
+        }
       ]
     },
     "configuration": {
       "title": "IntelliJ Styled Search",
@@ -134,8 +248,71 @@
         "intellijStyledSearch.searchHistoryLimit": {
           "type": "number",
           "default": 100,
           "description": "Maximum number of executed search queries to keep in the search history dropdown. Set to 0 to disable storing search history."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.mcpPort": {
+          "type": "number",
+          "default": 8765,
+          "description": "Localhost port used by the call graph MCP JSON-RPC endpoint when `Start Call Graph MCP Server` is run. Set to 0 to let the OS choose a free port."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.callGraphConcurrency": {
+          "type": "number",
+          "default": 0,
+          "minimum": 0,
+          "maximum": 32,
+          "description": "Maximum number of source files parsed concurrently when rebuilding the call graph. Set to 0 to auto-size from system parallelism, capped at 32."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.callGraphInlayHints": {
+          "type": "boolean",
+          "default": true,
+          "description": "Show call graph relation links as inlay hints next to symbols. By default this surfaces callers, usages, and implementations."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.callGraphShowCalleeInlayHints": {
+          "type": "boolean",
+          "default": false,
+          "description": "Also show callees in call graph inlay hints. Disabled by default because callers and usages are usually more useful for code navigation and agent context."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.callGraphImplementationProvider": {
+          "type": "boolean",
+          "default": true,
+          "description": "Provide Go to Implementation results from the call graph for interface and abstract symbols."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.callGraphExcludeGlobs": {
+          "type": "array",
+          "default": [
+            "**/.venv/**",
+            "**/venv/**",
+            "**/.tox/**",
+            "**/site-packages/**",
+            "**/__pycache__/**",
+            "**/.mypy_cache/**",
+            "**/.pytest_cache/**"
+          ],
+          "description": "Additional glob patterns excluded only from call graph rebuilds."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.callGraphIncludePossibleEdges": {
+          "type": "boolean",
+          "default": false,
+          "description": "Materialize ambiguous possible call graph edges. Disabled by default to avoid memory explosions in large repositories."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.callGraphIncludeUnresolvedEdges": {
+          "type": "boolean",
+          "default": true,
+          "description": "Materialize unresolved, dynamic, and external callsites as one dynamic edge per callsite. This keeps dynamic calls visible without exploding ambiguous possible edges."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxEdges": {
+          "type": "number",
+          "default": 10000000,
+          "minimum": 1000,
+          "description": "Maximum unique materialized call graph edges stored in memory during a rebuild."
+        },
+        "intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxPossibleTargetsPerCall": {
+          "type": "number",
+          "default": 8,
+          "minimum": 1,
+          "maximum": 40,
+          "description": "Maximum possible target edges per ambiguous call when possible edges are enabled."
         }
       }
     }
   },
